'''Crystan V''' was an object located in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was inhabited by a [[Unidentified Crystan V species|little green beings]].<ref name="DS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The first mention of Crystan V was in the [[2007]] novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] without detailed descriptions of the object.<ref name="DS" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Crystan system/Legends|Crystan star system]], and therefore Crystan V, in grid square L-12.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}}
